case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SF-HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS JENKINS, EBONY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SF-HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $782.98 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS, EBONY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,278.93 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SF-HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS, EBONY FREEMAN, MARCUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $45.50). SERVED NOV-10-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS, EBONY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SF-HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENKINS, EBONY FREEMAN, MARCUS $3,513.17 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,513.17
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $45.91). SERVED NOV-10-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, MARCUS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2007 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-02-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. SETTLEMENT PENDING. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE ON RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (SERVICE 12-01-2017) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SF-HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS, EBONY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS, EBONY FREEMAN, MARCUS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SF-HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENKINS, EBONY FREEMAN, MARCUS $2,278.78 PRINCIPAL, $91.41 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,370.19, PLAINTIFF PRESENT AT HEARING DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. MATTER HEARD BEFORE COMM. PAUL SLAVIT: CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE; NO EXHIBITS, NOT REPORTED (506) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
